Left Cerebral Cortex.Shape: Extensive folded gray mantle with multiple gyri and sulci
Left Cerebral Cortex.Location: Left outer layer of cerebral hemisphere
Left Cerebral Cortex.Intensity_Profile: Gray matter hypointense to underlying white matter on T1

Right Cerebral Cortex.Shape: Extensive folded gray mantle with multiple gyri and sulci
Right Cerebral Cortex.Location: Right outer layer of cerebral hemisphere
Right Cerebral Cortex.Intensity_Profile: Gray matter hypointense to underlying white matter on T1

Left Cerebral Nuclei.Shape: Clustered deep gray nuclei including caudate and lentiform
Left Cerebral Nuclei.Location: Left deep hemisphere lateral to thalamus
Left Cerebral Nuclei.Intensity_Profile: Intermediate T1 signal between cortex and white matter

Right Cerebral Nuclei.Shape: Clustered deep gray nuclei including caudate and lentiform
Right Cerebral Nuclei.Location: Right deep hemisphere lateral to thalamus
Right Cerebral Nuclei.Intensity_Profile: Intermediate T1 signal between cortex and white matter

Left Thalamus.Location: Left diencephalon lateral to third ventricle
Left Thalamus.Intensity_Profile: Deep gray slightly hypointense to perithalamic white matter

Right Thalamus.Location: Right diencephalon lateral to third ventricle
Right Thalamus.Intensity_Profile: Deep gray slightly hypointense to perithalamic white matter

Left Basal Forebrain.Shape: Irregular ventral gray region near septal area
Left Basal Forebrain.Location: Left inferior frontal base anterior to hypothalamus
Left Basal Forebrain.Intensity_Profile: Gray signal similar to striatum hypointense to white matter

Right Basal Forebrain.Shape: Irregular ventral gray region near septal area
Right Basal Forebrain.Location: Right inferior frontal base anterior to hypothalamus
Right Basal Forebrain.Intensity_Profile: Gray signal similar to striatum hypointense to white matter

Left Mesencephalon.Shape: Compact cylindrical midbrain with peduncles and tectum
Left Mesencephalon.Location: Left midline brainstem between diencephalon and pons
Left Mesencephalon.Intensity_Profile: Mixed T1 signal white tracts brighter than gray nuclei

Right Mesencephalon.Shape: Compact cylindrical midbrain with peduncles and tectum
Right Mesencephalon.Location: Right midline brainstem between diencephalon and pons
Right Mesencephalon.Intensity_Profile: Mixed T1 signal white tracts brighter than gray nuclei

Left Metencephalon.Shape: Rounded lobulated cerebellar structure with folia
Left Metencephalon.Location: Left posterior fossa dorsal to pons
Left Metencephalon.Intensity_Profile: Cerebellar cortex hypointense to internal white matter on T1

Right Metencephalon.Shape: Rounded lobulated cerebellar structure with folia
Right Metencephalon.Location: Right posterior fossa dorsal to pons
Right Metencephalon.Intensity_Profile: Cerebellar cortex hypointense to internal white matter on T1

Left Myelencephalon.Shape: Tapered caudal brainstem segment continuous with spinal cord
Left Myelencephalon.Location: Left medullary region ventral to fourth ventricle
Left Myelencephalon.Intensity_Profile: Intermediate T1 signal pyramids brighter than gray nuclei

Right Myelencephalon.Shape: Tapered caudal brainstem segment continuous with spinal cord
Right Myelencephalon.Location: Right medullary region ventral to fourth ventricle
Right Myelencephalon.Intensity_Profile: Intermediate T1 signal pyramids brighter than gray nuclei

Left White Matter.Shape: Extensive deep subcortical myelinated fiber system
Left White Matter.Intensity_Profile: Homogeneously hyperintense on T1 relative to gray matter

Right White Matter.Shape: Extensive deep subcortical myelinated fiber system
Right White Matter.Intensity_Profile: Homogeneously hyperintense on T1 relative to gray matter

Lateral Ventricle.Shape: C shaped bilateral CSF cavity with frontal and temporal horns
Lateral Ventricle.Location: Deep cerebral hemispheres surrounding caudate and thalamus
Lateral Ventricle.Intensity_Profile: CSF hypointense on T1 forming smooth cavity margin

Third and Fourth Ventricle.Shape: Midline CSF cavities narrow anterior and diamond posterior
Third and Fourth Ventricle.Location: Third between thalami fourth between pons and cerebellum
Third and Fourth Ventricle.Intensity_Profile: CSF hypointense on T1 defining ventricular spaces
